message:
test(vdbe,lib): add FK enforcement and HAVING regression tests, propagate time_travel field

Add comprehensive integration tests for foreign key constraint
enforcement covering INSERT validation, DELETE actions (NO ACTION,
CASCADE, SET NULL), and NULL FK values. Also add regression tests for
HAVING clauses that reference aggregates not present in the SELECT list.

- Propagate time_travel: None to all QualifiedTableRef test fixtures
  across codegen, planner, and AST crates to match the expanded struct
- Add decision_contract and planner adjustments for the new field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
